text: Most gamers think they have pro-level reactions. They dont. Average player 300ms, pros 180ms. 94pct overestimate their speed. Are you actually as fast as you think? #Gaming #Esports

Tested 1,200+ players last month. Only 6% show elite-tier spatial awareness. 71% have untapped mechanical skill they never realized. Your actual talent profile probably looks nothing like you think. gametan.ai #Gaming
That mechanic you've drilled for weeks but it still falls apart when it actually matters — what is it? Drop yours below. #Esports
hot take: most players dont need more aim training. they need to get better at reading situations before they aim. spatial awareness is the unlock, not crosshair placement. #FPS
